overview: A premium multi-page website for Aura Web Design, a digital agency offering custom websites, e-commerce solutions, and business growth services. Features a dark luxury aesthetic with gold accents, glassmorphism cards, and smooth animations across 5 pages.
features: Dark luxury theme with black background and gold (#D4AF37) accents
5 fully responsive pages: Home, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Contact
Fixed navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Clickable phone and Instagram contact links
3-tier pricing display with highlighted Standard plan
6-item portfolio grid with hover zoom effects
